chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2712 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.12093/2022. 3. For hearing of main petition. 29.01.2025 Mr. Inzamam Sharif, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Fahad Hussain Arijo, advocate for the respondent/SRB. Mr. Muhammad Kamran Khan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Present petition assails notice for audit. Prima facie the reasons for audit selection are mentioned in paragraph 3 thereof. Counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner shall submit before the authority and contest the notice, however, it may be just and proper for the authority not to take any adverse action against the petitioner, pending adjudication as aforesaid. Counsel for the respondent is present and states that the petition may be disposed of in above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
